lineup_source: Spain typical 2025/26 starting XI under Luis de la Fuente (4-3-3, Euro 2024-winning core)

players.name: Unai Simón
players.note: Born in Vitoria-Gasteiz, Álava; father a Guardia Civil officer from Zamora, mother an Ertzaintza officer from the Basque Country, both Spanish.

players.name: Dani Carvajal
players.note: Born in Leganés, Madrid; father is a National Police inspector, no foreign parental origin documented.

players.name: Robin Le Normand
players.note: Born in Pabu, Brittany, France; naturalised Spanish in 2023 after seven years in Spain, but parents are French (brother Théo also a footballer in France).

players.name: Aymeric Laporte
players.note: Born near Agen, France, to Lionel and Marie-José Laporte, both from Agen; naturalised Spanish in 2021.

players.name: Marc Cucurella
players.note: Born in Alella, Catalonia; no foreign parental origin documented, Catalan family assumed.

players.name: Rodri
players.note: Born in Madrid as Rodrigo Hernández Cascante; no foreign parental origin documented.

players.name: Pedri
players.note: Born in Bajamar, Tenerife, Canary Islands; no foreign parental origin documented.

players.name: Martín Zubimendi
players.note: Born in San Sebastián; father a retired university professor, mother a teacher, both Basque/Spanish.

players.name: Lamine Yamal
players.note: Born in Esplugues de Llobregat, Catalonia; father Mounir Nasraoui from Larache, Morocco, mother Sheila Ebana from Bata, Equatorial Guinea.

players.name: Nico Williams
players.note: Born in Pamplona to Ghanaian refugee parents who crossed the Sahara to reach Melilla, Spain; brother Iñaki plays for Ghana.

players.name: Álvaro Morata
players.note: Born in Madrid to Alfonso Morata and Susana Martín; no foreign parental origin documented.
